display_name:
Generate speech from text prompts using the MiniMax Speech-02 model. 

Optional parameters:
HD mode. Toggle on for higher quality output with a higher price. 
Set Speed. Set from 0.5 to 2. Default: 1.
description:
Generate speech from text prompts using the MiniMax Speech-02 model. 

Optional parameters:
HD mode. Toggle on for higher quality output with a higher price. 
Set Speed. Set from 0.5 to 2. Default: 1.
Set Volume. Set from 0 to 10. Default: 1.
Set Pitch. Set from -12 to 12. Default: 0.
Set Emotion. Select from happy, sad, angry, fearful, disgusted, surprised and fearful. Default: None.
Set Language boost. Select language available. Default. None.
Set Voice for the audio generation. Default: Wise Woman.

Please check the UI for allowed values for each parameter.
